title: Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates family as a Credit Analyst in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
